title: Aurora Cannabis Inc. (ACB) Earnings Dates & Report
text: SeekingAlpha earnings calendar and analysis provides comprehensive view of Aurora Cannabis quarterly results schedule and historical performance. Earnings schedule: Q3 2026 (FY2026): Reported February 4, 2026. Q2 2026 (FY2026): Reported November 5, 2025. Q1 2026 (FY2026): Reported August 15, 2025. Q4 2025 (FY2025): Reported June 18, 2025. Historical earnings surprises: Recent quarters show mix of beats and misses across EPS and revenue metrics. Q3 2026 revenue beat consensus, EPS beat adjusted metrics. Q1 2026 revenue beat consensus despite EPS miss. Indicates stronger revenue momentum than profitability timing. Earnings trends: Revenue growth accelerating through FY2025 and FY2026. Adjusted EBITDA generation expanding significantly. Free cash flow transition from negative to positive. GAAP profitability still elusive but improving trajectory visible. Key metrics tracked: Net revenue guidance and actual results. Adjusted EBITDA guidance and actual results. Free cash flow generation. Cash balance and debt levels. Medical cannabis segment growth rates. International vs. Canadian split. Analyst estimates: Consensus EPS and revenue estimates compiled from multiple analyst sources. Revisions tracked quarter by quarter. Guidance impact on subsequent period estimates. Sentiment indicators: Analyst commentary on earnings calls highlighting strategic priorities. Management tone regarding regulatory environment and competitive positioning. Market reaction analysis to earnings announcements.
